test.note: 223 tests passed across 16 test files. All notification email tests pass.

typecheck.note: Biome check passed with no issues.

lint.note: Biome lint check passed with no issues.

blockingIssues.description: Same blocking issue persists from round 5: Handoff references commit 191c22c (audit-trail milestone commit) instead of a polish milestone commit containing cross-area validation evidence. The validation evidence for VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005 exists in validation-state.json (marked pass) but was never committed to the polish milestone. This is a documentation/commit-reference issue, not a code issue. The actual validation work was performed in respective milestones (document-management, service-request-lifecycle, notifications, audit-trail) and is documented in validation-state.json.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Orchestrator should either: (1) Create a new commit in polish milestone that captures the cross-area validation evidence from validation-state.json and update the end-to-end-validation handoff to reference it, or (2) Accept that cross-area flows were validated across other milestones and update validation-state.json to reflect polish milestone ownership of VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that scrutiny validator handoffs must reference commits that contain evidence for the milestone being validated. Workers should commit validation evidence (screenshots, transcript excerpts, validation-state updates) to the correct milestone's evidence/ directory before completing handoff. The orchestrator should verify commit references before accepting handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 5 and 6 both show end-to-end-validation handoff referencing wrong commit (191c22c from audit-trail instead of polish). The evidence for cross-area flows exists in validation-state.json (marked pass) but not in a polish-specific commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update validation-state.json to indicate that VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005 were validated at polish milestone (instead of their respective earlier milestones) since polish is the final milestone that aggregates end-to-end validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current validation-state.json shows cross-area flows validated in their respective earlier milestones (document-management, service-request-lifecycle, notifications, audit-trail). Since polish is the final aggregation milestone, the cross-area flows should be marked as validatedAtMilestone: 'polish'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: All validators pass: 223 tests pass, Biome lint/check pass. No code issues found.
sharedStateObservations.reason: This is a documentation/commit-reference issue only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fix-test-infrastructure correctly resolved: The --maxWorkers=1 flag in vitest script prevents SQLite locking. All 223 tests pass when run with this flag.
sharedStateObservations.reason: This was a known infrastructure issue that is now resolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Cross-area flows validated in respective milestones: VAL-CROSS-001 (end-to-end citizen flow), VAL-CROSS-002 (admin reassignment), VAL-CROSS-003 (document lifecycle), VAL-CROSS-004 (schedule change propagation), VAL-CROSS-005 (hold expiration recovery) are all marked as PASSED in validation-state.json. The end-to-end-validation feature aggregates these validations.
sharedStateObservations.reason: Evidence exists in validation-state.json rather than in a dedicated polish evidence directory.

validationStateCrossAreaFlows.note: All cross-area flows validated in respective milestones and marked as pass in validation-state.json. The polish milestone aggregates this end-to-end validation.
